name: Dwight Eisenhower
longDesc: Commandant suprême du SHAEF, Dwight Eisenhower orchestre Torch, Husky et Overlord avant de devenir le 34e président des États-Unis. Carte WC4 maréchal équilibrée : stats polyvalentes et large pool de compétences, à choisir quand on veut un général « un slot, tous les théâtres ».

skills.name: Fleet Leader
skills.desc: 16% chance to give the enemy a critical attack when commanding ship units

skills.name: Carpet Bombing
skills.desc: Damage +8% to the defending forces in the city when air-raiding

skills.name: Depot Ship
skills.desc: Fix damaged ship units: each round HP+3

skills.name: Sailor
skills.desc: Counter attack +12% when attacked by the enemy at sea

skills.name: Shelter
skills.desc: Able to dodge 6% damage from the enemy's missile units

stages.label: Entraînement final
stages.notes: Slots max : 5. Coût additionnel : 0 médailles, 100 mérite.

training.summary: Entraînement premium débloquant des compétences signature et augmentant les plafonds d'attributs.

sources: Données extraites des fichiers de jeu World Conqueror 4

trainedSkills.name: Fleet Leader
trainedSkills.desc: 16% chance to give the enemy a critical attack when commanding ship units

trainedSkills.name: Carpet Bombing
trainedSkills.desc: Damage +8% to the defending forces in the city when air-raiding

trainedSkills.name: Depot Ship
trainedSkills.desc: Fix damaged ship units: each round HP+3

trainedSkills.name: Sailor
trainedSkills.desc: Counter attack +12% when attacked by the enemy at sea

trainedSkills.name: Shelter
trainedSkills.desc: Able to dodge 6% damage from the enemy's missile units

trainedSkills.name: Expeditionary Force Commander
trainedSkills.desc: When commanding ship units, gain +5 mobility and unaffected by effect that disable counterattack. When commanding units, increase 5% attack and counterattack damage for every 3 mobility.
trainedSkills.replaceableReason: Compétence débloquée via l'entraînement (Épées/Sceptres de Domination).

trainedSkills.name: Operation Overlord
trainedSkills.desc: Enemy units within a 3 hexes receive 35% additional damage, and disable the effects of sloped armor, protective device, provocation, abduction, and fighting alongside. After commanding ship units to eliminate an enemy, there is a 100% chance to grant an additional attack.
trainedSkills.replaceableReason: Compétence débloquée via l'entraînement (Épées/Sceptres de Domination).

longDescEn: Supreme Commander of SHAEF, Dwight Eisenhower orchestrated Operations Torch, Husky and Overlord before becoming the 34th US president. A WC4 marshal-rank balanced card with all-round stats and a deep skill pool — the pick when you want a single slot that handles every theatre.
longDescDe: Als Oberster Befehlshaber des SHAEF koordinierte Dwight Eisenhower die Operationen Torch, Husky und Overlord und wurde später 34. US-Präsident. Im WC4 eine ausgeglichene Marschall-Karte mit vielseitigen Werten und tiefem Skillpool — die Wahl, wenn du mit einem Slot jedes Theater abdecken willst.
